{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/56215891?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/sammiee5311", "id": 56215891, "login": "sammiee5311", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU2MjE1ODkx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/sammiee5311", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40192", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact
Pillow did not limit the amount of GZIP-compressed data read when decoding a FITS image, making it vulnerable to decompression bomb attacks. A specially crafted FITS file could cause unbounded memory consumption, leading to denial of service (OOM crash or severe performance degradation).

### Patches
The amount of data read is now limited to the necessary amount.
Fixed in Pillow 12.2.0 (PR #9521).

### Workarounds
Avoid Pillow >= 10.3.0, < 12.2.0
Only open [specific image formats](https://pillow.readthedocs.io/en/stable/releasenotes/8.0.0.html#image-open-add-formats-parameter), excluding FITS.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00671, "percentile": 0.47525}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-13T19:22:35Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40192"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-15T23:16:10Z", "published_at": "2026-04-13T19:22:35Z", "references": ["https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/security/advisories/GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/pull/9521", "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/commit/3cb854e8b2bab43f40e342e665f9340d861aa628", "https://pillow.readthedocs.io/en/stable/releasenotes/12.2.0.html#prevent-fits-decompression-bomb", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40192", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/python-pillow/Pillow/security-advisories/GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow", "summary": "FITS GZIP decompression bomb in Pillow", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:21:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-whj4-6x5x-4v2j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "12.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pillow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 10.3.0, < 12.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: FITS GZIP decompression bomb in Pillow
